hyperedges.label: DEX Trading Flow: Page → Hooks → Smart Contracts
Marketplace README anchors full and MVP specs
Execution flow doc and phase index define ATS rollout
0G guideline and recode log document same migration
Raw market data normalized into typed packets for downstream agents
Global regime from HMM gates indicator choice and downstream risk sizing
LangGraph cycle collects votes, persists receipt, may invoke execution
Public MetaMask logo asset for wallet recognition and branding
